name: ai-native-architect
description: An AI-Native methodology system, grounded in the AI Native Organization Methodology (organization = distribution of judgment x flow of context). One architecture/judgment-tier skill — ai-native-architect — designs an AI-Native organization; six execution-tier skills (engineering, design, research, learning, innovation, org) do the work the AI-native way: agents execute the abundant, humans hold the few judgment nodes. Six faces of one kernel.
